summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Head Physio Calendar feature for Branch Admin. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components working correctly including tab navigation, doctor list, calendar view, time slots grid, duration/type selection, and Add Head Physio modal. Patient Pipeline tab regression test passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Head Physio Calendar feature fully implemented with all required functionality
Tab system properly integrated into BranchAdminBoard component
All 4 new backend endpoints working correctly: POST /branch/head-physios, GET /doctors/{id}/calendar, POST /doctors/{id}/calendar-slots, POST /doctors/{id}/remove-slots

Calendar UI includes all required features: month navigation, date picker, time slot grid (8AM-8PM, 30min intervals), duration selection (15/30/45/60min), consultation type selection (initial/follow_up/review)
Slot states properly visualized: Available (green), Adding (violet), Removing (red), Booked (amber)
Save/Discard controls appear when pending changes exist
Patient Pipeline tab still works correctly (regression verified)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for Head Physio doctors and calendar slots
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 - Head Physio Calendar feature testing completed. New feature adds: 1) Tab system to BranchAdminBoard with 'Patient Pipeline' and 'Head Physio Calendar' tabs, 2) Calendly-style calendar UI for managing doctor availability with duration and consultation type per slot, 3) 4 new backend endpoints in v3_head_physio.py router. All tests passed. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_head_physio_calendar_iteration19.py covers all new endpoints. Branch Admin credentials: branchadmin@fitsiomax.com / branch123

features_tested.branch_admin_login: PASS - Branch Admin can login and access board

tab_navigation.patient_pipeline_tab: PASS - Tab visible and clickable, shows Kanban board
tab_navigation.head_physio_calendar_tab: PASS - Tab visible and clickable, shows calendar component

head_physio_calendar_ui.doctor_list_panel: PASS - Left panel shows list of Head Physio doctors with slot counts
head_physio_calendar_ui.add_head_physio_button: PASS - Button visible and opens modal
head_physio_calendar_ui.add_head_physio_modal: PASS - Modal with Full Name, Email, Password, Specialization fields
head_physio_calendar_ui.calendar_panel: PASS - Right panel shows calendar when doctor selected
head_physio_calendar_ui.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Select a Head Physio' message when no doctor selected
head_physio_calendar_ui.date_selection: PASS - Clicking date shows time slots grid
head_physio_calendar_ui.consultation_type_options: PASS - Initial, Follow-up, Review options visible and selectable
head_physio_calendar_ui.slot_toggle: PASS - Clicking slot toggles add/remove state
head_physio_calendar_ui.pending_changes_indicator: PASS - Shows 'X unsaved changes' when slots modified
head_physio_calendar_ui.save_discard_buttons: PASS - Save Changes and Discard buttons appear with pending changes

backend_endpoints.GET /api/v3/doctors/{id}/calendar: PASS - Returns slots, slot_details, booked info
backend_endpoints.POST /api/v3/doctors/{id}/calendar-slots: PASS - Adds slots with duration and type

regression.patient_pipeline_tab: PASS - Kanban board with 8 stages working
regression.lead_modal: PASS - Lead detail modal with Overview, Actions, Remarks, Activity tabs
regression.branch_board_api: PASS - GET /api/v3/branch-board/{branch_id} returns leads and stage_counts
regression.doctors_list_api: PASS - GET /api/v3/doctors returns list filtered by branch

mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are live
